column6: Not added to the drafting deck - add small plates to opponents dirty dishes if you have left-over hunger tokens during drafting.
time=1 If previous card washed was a Plate.
time=3 if have already washed 2 or more Cutlery
Whenever you drop a [time-token] while washing this: time is increased by 2
time=2 if you have a Soak Tub
Whenever you drop a (time-token) while washing this: time is increased by 5
time=5 if have already washed 2 or more Cultery
Cannot be washed after any non-Drink Bottle card
When played: Say STOP - players drop any [time-tokens] they hold.  Opponent cannot touch a card or token until you do
Use in place of any single Tool Requirement. Does not count for Effects
When played: the next card opponent puts tokens on has its time increased by 8
When played: Take an opponents tool and put it on the bottom of one of the piles Opponent cannot search for or play any tools until you set down the pile.
Opponent cannot win unless they also have Detergent
